title: howardia hians
intro: Howardia hians is a succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Howardia hians include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in treating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and minor burns. In herbal preparations, Howardia hians is often used in topical creams, ointments, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and can also be consumed as a tea or tincture to promote overall well-being.
